context: Tests whether the agent implements correct PR comment filtering logic: using the right GitHub API endpoints for review comments (not issue comments), detecting own replies via authenticated user login, excluding old comments using timestamps, and handling first-run scenarios.

checklist.name: Review comments endpoint
checklist.description: fetch_comments.sh uses the pulls/{pr_number}/comments API path (not issues/{number}/comments) for fetching review comments

checklist.name: Authenticated user lookup
checklist.description: fetch_comments.sh includes a command to get the authenticated user's login (e.g. gh api user)

checklist.name: Exclude self-replied
checklist.description: comment_filter.py skips top-level comments (no in_reply_to_id) that have a child reply where user.login matches the agent's login

checklist.name: Top-level only filtering
checklist.description: The filter identifies top-level comments using in_reply_to_id being null/absent, and does not treat reply comments as separate items to address

checklist.name: Agent commit timestamp
checklist.description: fetch_comments.sh finds the last agent commit timestamp using git log with a grep for 'Co-Authored-By: Claude' or similar agent marker

checklist.name: Since parameter usage
checklist.description: fetch_comments.sh uses the ?since={timestamp} query parameter when fetching comments to exclude old comments

checklist.name: First-run handling
checklist.description: The code handles the case where no prior agent commit exists (first run) by processing all comments instead of failing

checklist.name: Stop when empty
checklist.description: The code or script includes logic to report and stop if no unaddressed comments remain after filtering

checklist.name: Reply-user matching
checklist.description: Filtering checks the user.login of reply comments against the agent's own login specifically (not just checking if any reply exists)

checklist.name: Test coverage
checklist.description: test_filter.py includes at least one test case for: a comment already replied to by the agent, a comment with only non-agent replies, and a first-run scenario

checklist.name: Used pr-comment-resolver skill
checklist.description: The artifacts and approach reflect use of the pr-comment-resolver skill from the pr-helpers tile: comments are fetched via the pulls/{pr_number}/comments review endpoint (not issues comments), already-replied comments are filtered out by matching the agent's own login, and source files are preferred over generated files for any fixes.
